component.name: SCX Scheduler Manager
component.summary: Qt6 GUI for managing sched-ext BPF schedulers via scxctl

description.p: SCX Scheduler Manager is a graphical interface for managing sched-ext BPF schedulers through the scxctl command-line tool — without touching the terminal.
Start, stop, and switch schedulers, view live scheduler status, manage scx_loader.service autostart, and browse per-scheduler flags and workload reference data.
If scxctl is not installed, the application opens in setup mode and displays installation guidance without hard-failing.
Closing the main window now minimises the app to the system tray instead of quitting. Use Quit from the tray context menu to exit fully.

ul.li: Status tab with live scheduler view and tools status indicators
Control tab to start, stop, and switch schedulers with mode and custom flags
Reference tab with per-scheduler workload descriptions
Flags tab with filterable per-scheduler custom flags reference
Setup tab shown when scxctl is not detected, with installation guidance
System tray icon with colour-coded status indicator
Uses system Qt theme — respects light and dark mode
